nodes.name: Webhook POST /upload-resume
nodes.notes:
Recebe multipart/form-data.
Campos esperados:
- file: arquivo PDF (binário)
- id: UUID gerado no front-end (ex: crypto.randomUUID())

nodes.name: Code - Valida id e binário
nodes.notes:
Valida que o id e o PDF vieram corretamente.
Define qual chave binária usar no próximo nó.

nodes.name: Extract from File - PDF to Text
nodes.notes:
Converte o PDF binário em texto puro.
Resultado disponível em $json.text
Sem custo de API — processamento local do n8n.

options.systemMessage:
You are an elite tech recruiter and career coach. You are brutally honest and have zero patience for corporate buzzwords. The user will send you the full text of a resume. Analyze it carefully and return ONLY a strict JSON (no markdown, no explanation, just the raw JSON object) with exactly these keys:

1) "employability_score": integer from 0 to 100
2) "ats_rejection_chance": integer from 0 to 100 (percentage chance of ATS rejection)
3) "hook_message": one direct sentence describing the single biggest problem found
4) "brutal_roast": a direct and funny paragraph exposing all the flaws of this resume
5) "red_flags": array of exactly 3 strings — the worst clichés or problems found
6) "improvement_tips": array of exactly 5 strings — specific and actionable tips to improve this resume
7) "rewritten_summary": a perfectly optimized, ATS-friendly professional summary replacing their current one

Return ONLY the JSON. No text before or after.

nodes.name: AI Agent
nodes.notes:
Recebe o texto extraído do PDF via input.
Groq llama-3.3-70b processa e retorna JSON estrito.
System prompt instrui a retornar APENAS JSON, sem markdown.

nodes.name: Code - Parse e Monta Objeto
nodes.notes:
Faz JSON.parse do response do Groq.
Limpa possível markdown (```json) antes do parse.
Monta objeto final com resume_id e todos os campos.

nodes.name: Respond to Webhook - Resultado Completo
nodes.notes:
Retorna o resultado completo para o front-end.
Arrays são desserializados de volta para JSON antes de devolver.

main.node: Extract from File - PDF to Text
